problem_statement: Generate 11 wild ideas for missing capabilities based on usage patterns in modern backend development (Node.js, Python, Go, FastAPI, Spring Boot ecosystem)

chaos_ideas.title: Polyglot Service Mesh Auto-Configurator
chaos_ideas.description: AI-powered system that automatically configures service mesh (Istio, Linkerd) for mixed-language microservices, handling language-specific nuances and performance optimizations
chaos_ideas.gold_extraction: High - addresses real complexity in polyglot deployments

chaos_ideas.title: Container Orchestration Chaos Monkey
chaos_ideas.description: Intelligent chaos engineering tool that simulates realistic failure scenarios across Kubernetes clusters with polyglot services, learning from actual deployment patterns
chaos_ideas.gold_extraction: Medium - extends existing chaos engineering concepts

chaos_ideas.title: API Gateway Configuration Wizard
chaos_ideas.description: Self-learning system that analyzes code patterns and automatically configures API gateways (Kong, Envoy) with language-specific routing, authentication, and rate limiting

chaos_ideas.title: Database Migration Time Machine
chaos_ideas.description: Rollback-capable migration system that can revert schema changes across multiple database types (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis) while preserving data integrity in polyglot environments

chaos_ideas.title: Event-Driven Architecture Composer
chaos_ideas.description: Visual composer that generates event-driven microservice architectures with automatic message queue configuration (Kafka, RabbitMQ) optimized for different language runtimes
chaos_ideas.gold_extraction: High - addresses complex event architecture design

chaos_ideas.title: Performance Bottleneck Detective
chaos_ideas.description: AI detective that traces performance issues across language boundaries, identifying hot paths in distributed polyglot systems with actionable optimization suggestions

chaos_ideas.title: Security Compliance Auto-Enforcer
chaos_ideas.description: Automated system that scans polyglot codebases and enforces security compliance (OWASP, PCI DSS) with language-specific remediation guidance

chaos_ideas.title: Resource Allocation Alchemist
chaos_ideas.description: Dynamic resource allocator that optimizes CPU/memory allocation across different language runtimes based on real-time performance metrics and cost constraints

chaos_ideas.title: Deployment Pipeline Polyglot Orchestrator
chaos_ideas.description: CI/CD orchestrator that handles build, test, and deployment pipelines for mixed-language projects with intelligent dependency resolution and parallel execution

chaos_ideas.title: Observability Data Fusion Engine
chaos_ideas.description: Unified observability platform that normalizes and correlates metrics, logs, and traces from different language observability libraries into coherent insights

chaos_ideas.title: Code Generation Polyglot Bridge
chaos_ideas.description: Intelligent code generator that creates language-specific SDKs and client libraries from API specifications, handling language-specific idioms and performance patterns
